description: Internal-only application (admin panel, ops dashboard, employee tool). Auth-walled, low traffic (< 100 DAU), no SEO, no public a11y requirements. Goal: ship features fast, not engineer for scale.

anti_recommendations.design-system-investment: kill — four-user audience does not measure design polish
anti_recommendations.wcag-aaa-compliance: kill — auth-walled means screen-reader audience is known and small
anti_recommendations.edge-cdn-for-mobile-4g: kill — internal users are on corporate networks
anti_recommendations.feature-flags: warn — usually unnecessary at this scale, push-and-pray is fine for non-customer-facing changes
anti_recommendations.kubernetes: kill — single container on Fly.io / Render / EC2 t3.small is overkill already

canon_references: Donald Reinertsen, Principles of Product Development Flow (2009) — minimize WIP and ceremony
Retool internal benchmarks (2024) — 80% of internal-tool teams over-invest in a custom build
